title: Zygogynum calophyllum
taxonomy: Zygogynum calophyllum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Winteraceae, native to New Caledonia. The Winteraceae family is a small group of flowering plants, commonly known as the "winterberry family". This family is also known as the "canella family". The Winteraceae family is part of the larger group called the Laurales, which is an order of flowering plants. The Laurales order is a part of the larger clade called the magnoliids, which includes various flowering plant families.
